ogTitle: Omadale vs One Tree: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Omadale and One Tree.
heading: Omadale vs One Tree — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Omadale, New South Wales and One Tree, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: One Tree has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Omadale (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Omadale or One Tree safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Omadale has a flood risk score of 47/100, while One Tree scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Omadale scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. One Tree scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Omadale or One Tree?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. One Tree has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
